name: Cheddar Toss and Heat
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 325°F (163°C). Melt butter or margarine over low heat. Pour the popcorn into a large, shallow baking pan. Add butter, garlic salt, onion salt, and cheese, a small amount of each at a time, and toss gently with a spatula. Heat in the oven for 5 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until the cheese is melted. Yield: Makes 4 quarts.
